description_long: This is a wooden chaise with a lattice design, featuring a high, arched backrest and a matching seat, both constructed from interwoven wooden slats forming a diamond pattern. The frame is robust, with elegantly curved armrests and cabriole-style legs that add a touch of classic sophistication. The wood appears to have a matte, weathered finish, suggesting it is suitable for outdoor or garden use. The seat is open and lacks any visible cushions or upholstery, emphasizing the geometric latticework. The overall structure is sturdy, with ample space for a single person to sit comfortably. The design is both decorative and functional, making it a striking piece for urban parks, patios, or public seating areas.
description: A wooden chaise with a high, arched lattice backrest, curved armrests, and cabriole legs, featuring a diamond-patterned open seat and a weathered matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full lattice backrest, open seat, and both curved armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the curve of the armrest, and the profile of the cabriole leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the arched top and full lattice pattern of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the armrest and leg curvature.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and arched, constructed from interwoven wooden slats forming a diamond lattice pattern. It is a single, unsegmented piece with a gently curved top and no additional decorative elements beyond the latticework.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, each with a gently curved, sculpted design that matches the classic style of the frame.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-style, featuring elegant outward curves and a slightly ornate profile, all crafted from the same wood as the rest of the frame. There are no additional decorative carvings or embellishments.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the seat and backrest are composed entirely of open wooden latticework, creating a geometric diamond pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present on the chaise; the seating surface is formed solely by the wooden lattice structure.
